title: SECTION 101.3. Circumvention
text: No person shall use any plan, activity, device or contrivance which the executive director determines will, without resulting in an actual reduction of air contaminants, conceal or appear to minimize the effects of an emission which would otherwise constitute a violation of the Act or regulations. Air introduced for dilution purposes only is considered a circumvention of the regulations.
source_note: The provisions of this §101.3 adopted to be effective January 1, 1976
